scripts.build: cd ../../packages/nitro-plugins && vp pack src/index.ts src/observability-plugin.ts src/otel.ts --dts && cd ../../apps/console && vp build
scripts.generate: vp exec openapi-ts -i ../../../sandbox-rental-service/openapi/openapi-3.1.yaml -o src/__generated/sandbox-rental-api -p @hey-api/typescript @hey-api/sdk valibot && vp exec openapi-ts -i ../../../identity-service/openapi/openapi-3.1.yaml -o src/__generated/identity-api -p @hey-api/typescript @hey-api/sdk valibot && vp exec openapi-ts -i ../../../governance-service/openapi/openapi-3.1.yaml -o src/__generated/governance-api -p @hey-api/typescript @hey-api/sdk valibot && vp exec openapi-ts -i ../../../profile-service/openapi/openapi-3.1.yaml -o src/__generated/profile-api -p @hey-api/typescript @hey-api/sdk valibot && vp exec openapi-ts -i ../../../notifications-service/openapi/openapi-3.1.yaml -o src/__generated/notifications-api -p @hey-api/typescript @hey-api/sdk valibot && vp exec node ../../scripts/mark-generated-ts-nocheck.mjs src/__generated/sandbox-rental-api src/__generated/identity-api src/__generated/governance-api src/__generated/profile-api src/__generated/notifications-api && vp fmt src/__generated/sandbox-rental-api src/__generated/identity-api src/__generated/governance-api src/__generated/profile-api src/__generated/notifications-api --write
